<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.8 -->

# src/dashboard/views

Renders terminal-based tabular/ASCII visualizations for telemetry dashboard commands (summary, per-entry drill-down, timeline Gantt chart, cost trends).

## Contents

**[entries.ts](./entries.ts)** — renders per-entry drill-down table with columns [File, Model, In Tok, Out Tok, Cache R, Cache W, Latency, Ret, Status], computes P90 latency, highlights errors (red), high latency (yellow), success (green); exports `renderEntriesTable`, `extractFileName`, `truncate`, `percentile`.

**[summary.ts](./summary.ts)** — outputs tabular run log summary with columns [Run, Backend, Model, Cmd, Files, Calls, In Tok, Out Tok, Cache R, Cache W, Duration, Err, Cost], dynamic column width computation, total run count and aggregate cost footer; exports `renderSummaryTable`.

**[timeline.ts](./timeline.ts)** — renders ASCII Gantt chart (`BAR_WIDTH = 60`) with phase execution bars, worker task spans (medium shade `\u2593` for success, light shade `\u2591` for failure), speedup/utilization metrics; exports `renderTimeline`, `renderPhase`, `renderWorker`, `renderConcurrencyStats`, `colorPercent`.

**[trends.ts](./trends.ts)** — aggregates logs by date, displays daily cost table [Date, Runs, Calls, Cost, In Tok, Out Tok, Duration, Err], cache savings comparison, cost per file, error rate bar chart (red `\u2588`, 1 block per 2%), ASCII sparkline (`\u2581`–`\u2588`, 8 levels) scaled between min/max daily costs; exports `renderTrends`, `DayMetrics`, `aggregateByDate`, `renderDailyTable`, `renderCacheSavings`, `renderCostPerFile`, `renderErrorRate`, `renderSparkline`.

## File Relationships

All views import `formatCost`, `formatTokens`, `formatDuration` from `../cost-calculator.js` for consistent number formatting. `entries.ts` and `summary.ts` both import `shortRunId` from `../log-reader.js` for run ID truncation. `timeline.ts` imports `shortTraceId` from `../trace-reader.js` for trace ID display. All modules consume `RunLog` type from `../../ai/types.js`; `timeline.ts` additionally uses `ParsedTrace`, `PhaseTimeline`, `WorkerTimeline` from `../trace-reader.js`.

## Behavioral Contracts

**Date Extraction:**
- `log.startTime.slice(0, 10)` — YYYY-MM-DD substring (trends.ts)

**File Extraction Pattern:**
- `/File: (.+?)(?:\n|$)/` — regex to parse filename from prompt text when `filesRead[0].path` unavailable (entries.ts)

**Unicode Characters:**
- Sparkline levels: `'\u2581\u2582\u2583\u2584\u2585\u2586\u2587\u2588'` (8 characters, min to max) — trends.ts
- Gantt bar fill: `'\u2593'` (medium shade, success), `'\u2591'` (light shade, failure) — timeline.ts
- Bar chart block: `'\u2588'` (full block, red for error rate) — trends.ts
- Checkmark: `'\u2713'` (displayed when error rate is zero) — trends.ts
- Ellipsis: `'\u2026'` (truncation indicator) — entries.ts

**Layout Constants:**
- `BAR_WIDTH = 60` — max character width for timeline bars (timeline.ts)
- Bar chart scale: 1 block per 2% (trends.ts error rate)
- Table separator: repeated dash `'-'` matching header length (all table views)

**Color Thresholds:**
- Utilization: green ≥80%, yellow ≥50%, red <50% (timeline.ts)
- Errors: red if >0 (summary.ts, entries.ts)
- High latency: yellow if >P90 (entries.ts)
- Costs: yellow (summary.ts, trends.ts), savings green (trends.ts)

**Percentile Calculation:**
- `percentile(values: number[], p: number)` — computes p-th percentile (0.9 for P90) from sorted array (entries.ts)

**Worker Display Limit:**
- Max 10 workers rendered per phase, remainder count shown (timeline.ts)
